## What's Changed

First stable release of the Aurora configuration app.

### New Features

- **Full Color Customization**: Redesigned color editor with two-layer tokens, including overrides for derived colors.
- **Sidebar Navigation Option**: New submenu setting to switch to Aurora's sidebar layout.

### Improvements

- Faster configuration page (reduced subprocess/ubus overhead, aggregated init data).
- Clearer color token labels and descriptions.
- Improved color editor display and reduced validation churn.
- Updated translations.

### Other Changes

- For remaining changes, see the [full changelog](https://github.com/eamonxg/luci-app-aurora-config/compare/v0.4.0...v1.0.0)
